title: Demo 4: dame loop capture with extra central branching.
description:
Demo 4: dame loop capture with extra central branching.

Same ring as Demo 3, but with an extra black pion on E5 in the centre.
The central piece creates genuine branches: some sequences capture only the
outer ring and end on F8, while others weave through E5 and end elsewhere.

  Outer ring loop (ends F8):
    F8 -> G7 -> H6 -> G5 -> F4 -> E3 -> D2 -> C3 -> B4 -> C5 -> D6 -> E7 -> F8

In the REPL, try:
  > f8 f8
The app lists the matching routes. Choose one with:
  > f8 f8 1
  > f8 f8 2
